name: Shrimp Mold- Nancy : Phoenix Bridge Director
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt tomato soup and cream cheese together.
2. Dissolve gelatin in 1/3 cup water and add to the melted mixture.
3. Add diced vegetables, shrimp, mayo, Tabasco sauce, garlic, and Worcestershire sauce to the bowl with the dissolved gelatin.
4. Pour the mixture into a Tupperware cereal bowl.
5. Chill until set.
6. Serve with crackers.
